hero.title: Home Care in Anne Arundel County
hero.description: MarkoCare serves Anne Arundel County families with the same RN-supervised, W2 employee standard of care we bring to every county — providing compassionate, professional home care in Annapolis, Glen Burnie, Severna Park, Pasadena, and coastal Maryland communities.

localNote: Anne Arundel County includes both urban communities near Baltimore and quieter coastal towns — our caregivers are familiar with both environments and the families who call them home.
